cover.subtitle: Apple's last Cook keynote, Claude on your iPhone, and a $1.75T IPO. The 6 stories that actually matter.

cards.label: APPLE
cards.headline: Siri got a new brain, and it's Google's
bullets: Tim Cook's final keynote as CEO went all-in on AI.
Siri now runs on a custom 1.2-trillion-parameter Gemini model Apple licenses for ~$1B a year.
Bigger twist: you can now pick ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude to power your iPhone.

cards.label: ANTHROPIC
cards.headline: Claude is now an iPhone option
bullets: For the first time, Claude lives natively inside Apple Intelligence.
That's ~2.2 billion Apple devices as a potential front door.
Even 5% choosing Claude = 100M+ new users. Its biggest consumer move ever.

cards.label: MARKET SHARE
cards.headline: Claude just grew 306% in one quarter
bullets: Web visits jumped from 203M to 824M between January and April.
It now holds 12.5% share in the US, ahead of its global average.
ChatGPT still leads at 54.7%, Gemini 27.4%. But the gap is closing fast.

cards.label: MICROSOFT
cards.headline: Claude can now run your spreadsheets
bullets: Microsoft's Foundry catalog hit 11,000+ models in one place.
The headline: Claude landed in Excel Agent Mode.
It writes formulas, cleans data, and builds workflows for ~750M Excel users.

cards.label: THE MONEY
cards.headline: The largest IPO in history is 4 days away
bullets: SpaceX prices June 11 and trades June 12 at $1.75 trillion or more.
Three near-trillion-dollar AI IPOs in a single quarter. That has never happened.

cards.label: REGULATION
cards.headline: The AI compliance clock is ticking
bullets: Colorado's AI Act goes live in 22 days (June 30).
The EU AI Act lands in 55 days (August 2), with fines up to 7% of global revenue.
If your business ships AI, this stopped being theoretical today.

cta.subtitle: AI news, decoded daily. No hype, just what actually matters.
cta.pill: Save this  ·  Send it to a friend

caption: AI just had its biggest day of the year. Tim Cook's final keynote, Claude landing on the iPhone, and the largest IPO in history, all in one Monday. Here are the 6 stories that matter. Follow @vascoyaps for AI news decoded daily. #AInews #ArtificialIntelligence #Claude #Apple #WWDC2026 #Anthropic #AItools #techtok #AIexplained
